signals.description: No self-audit/verification step in DOT flows before human review gate
signals.recommendation: Add a self-check node before each human review gate in all DOT flowcharts

signals.description: Cross-file consistency checking stated in iron rules but not proceduralized in DOT flows
signals.recommendation: Add explicit cross-reference verification nodes in DOT flows

signals.description: Content preservation rules are implicit across revision skills, not standalone testable invariants
signals.recommendation: Add explicit preservation checklist as mandatory output section

signals.description: External reference dependencies not inlined in SKILL.md — agent must know file schemas without external reads
signals.recommendation: Inline minimal file schemas in output contract sections
